name: @btech/design-system
description: Multi-tenant design token source of truth — React, Vue, Flutter

scripts.generate: pnpm exec tsx packages/tokens/sd.config.ts && pnpm --filter @btech/tokens build && pnpm install --lockfile-only --silent
scripts.generate:web: pnpm exec tsx packages/tokens/sd.config.ts --skip-flutter && pnpm --filter @btech/tokens build && pnpm install --lockfile-only --silent
scripts.validate: pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/lockfile-sync.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/schema.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/contrast.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/boundary.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/workspace-deps.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/figma-shape.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/version-consistency.ts && pnpm exec tsx tools/validators/plugin-manifest.ts
